g.inkscape:label: 01 Foundations
g.text: Vector sheet revised with exact heights (320px expanded), left/right side stripes, exact tab styles, tool rail pane, and VU meters.

g.inkscape:label: 02 Core Knobs
g.text: Revised modulated arc: cream-white (F6F6F6), larger radius wrapping outside the dial.

g.inkscape:label: 03 Side Rails
g.text: Highlights are LEFT/RIGHT lines (not top). Dynamic inputs have VU meters.

g.inkscape:label: 04 Previews
g.text: Adds ValueDragBoxes, Sampler RootKey step-spinners, and filter icons.

g.inkscape:label: 05 Assembled Cards
g.text: 05 Composed Device Chassis Cards, Tool Rails & Out-Rails (Revised)
Left Tool Rail, sharp-cornered cards, Left/Right accent stripes, and exact header tab fills.
